title: Diagnostic criteria for anxiety disorders and fear-related disorders
paperName: Paper 3 - Specialist Options: Approaches, Issues and Debates
summary: 9990 Clinical — GAD, phobias, panic disorder, and fear-related disorder criteria.
learningObjectives: Outline types of anxiety and fear-related disorders.
Distinguish normal fear from clinical anxiety.

simpleExplanation.title: When fear takes over
simpleExplanation.summary: Anxiety disorders involve excessive, persistent fear or worry that impairs daily life — from specific phobias to generalised anxiety.
steps: Specific phobia — irrational fear of object/situation.

sections.content: **Anxiety diagnosis** (1.4.1) — distinguish **phobia vs GAD vs panic** with criteria.
